zh.lifeSummary: 當Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples於1254年1月1日出生在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里時，他的父親Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile26歲，母親Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile23歲。他於大約1270年5月與Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1309年5月5日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在法國布-度-o艾--普洛福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples于1254年1月1日出生在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里时，他的父亲Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile26岁，母亲Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile23岁。他于大约1270年5月与Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1309年5月5日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在法国布-度-o艾--普洛福斯。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anjou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France (see Langevin ).

variants.name: Langevin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Henri, Jean-Louis, Pierre, Adelard, Emile, Gaston, Leodore, Lucien, Marcel.

French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', for an Angevin, i.e. for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France that was ruled by a count as an independent territory from the 10th century. The province became a property of the English Crown for fifty years at the end of the 12th century. Compare Longway and Lonsway .

History: Mathurin Langevin dit Lacroix from Le Lude in Sarthe, France, married Marie-Thérèse Martin in Quebec City, QC, in 1674. Michel Langevin from Paris, France, married Marguerite Guertin in Contrecoeur, QC, in 1714. Jean Bergevin dit Langevin from Angers in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Piton in Quebec City, QC, in 1668. Charles Citoleux/Sitoleux dit Langevin from Chambellay in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie-Louise Harel in Montreal, QC, in 1739.

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: When Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples was born on 1 January 1254, in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy, his father, Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile, was 26 and his mother, Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile, was 23. He married Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples about May 1270, in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 5 May 1309, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples est né le 1 janvier 1254, à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie, son père, Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples environ mai 1270, à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 mai 1309, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples am 1. Januar 1254 in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile 26 und seine Mutter Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile 23. Er hat um Mai 1270 in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Mai 1309 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples è nato il il 1 gennaio 1254 nel Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia, il suo padre, Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples circa maggio 1270, nel Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 maggio 1309, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naplesが1254年1月1日にイタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリで生まれた時，父Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicileは26歳，母Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicileは23歳であった。約1270年5月にイタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリでÁrpád-házi Mária Reine de Naplesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1309年5月5日に故郷で55歳で死去し，フランスボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples(이)가 1254년 1월 1일 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 5월 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에서 Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1309년 5월 5일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--플로븐스에 묻혔다.

mn.1 January 1254–5 May 1309: 1254 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1309 оны Тавдугаар сарын 5
mn.Iden, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: Iden, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.1 January 1254–5 May 1309: 1 de janeiro de 1254–5 de maio de 1309
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1254, em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples aproximadamente maio de 1270, em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de maio de 1309, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples родился 1 января 1254 г. в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия, его отцу по имени Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples около май 1270 г. в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 мая 1309 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, Франция.

sm.from 1285 to 1289: mai le 1285 e o'o I le 1289

es.1 January 1254–5 May 1309: 1 de enero de 1254–5 de mayo de 1309
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Charles d'Anjou II, Roi de Naples nació el 1 de enero de 1254, en Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia, su papá, Charles I d'Anjou Roi de Naples et de Sicile, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Provence Reine de Sicile, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Árpád-házi Mária Reine de Naples aproximadamente mayo de 1270, en Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1309, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia.
